candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above financial items, but it appears to be a total operating D&A amount rather than clearly COGS-specific. Adding it to COGS would risk misallocating shared operating D&A and double counting against SG&A.

candidates.row_label: Other operating costs Operating proft before depreciation and amorti-
candidates.why: This row explicitly indicates costs before depreciation and amortisation, so it is evidence that D&A is excluded from that overhead line, not itself a D&A row for COGS.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The only visible D&A line is a total operating D&A row and should not be assigned to COGS separately without clearer bucket attribution.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation and amortisation of tangible and intangible fixed assets
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line above financial items. The selected SG&A bucket includes a row explicitly labelled 'before depreciation and amorti-', which suggests D&A is outside those selected SG&A rows. However, this visible D&A line looks like a total operating D&A amount, not clearly SG&A-only.

candidates.row_label: Other operating costs Operating proft before depreciation and amorti-
candidates.why: Selected SG&A component explicitly excludes depreciation and amortisation, but this row is not itself D&A and therefore should not be added as XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: Although SG&A selection appears to exclude D&A, the only explicit D&A row is a consolidated operating total and is not clearly attributable solely to SG&A. To avoid double counting or misallocation, do not add a separate XSGA_DA row.
